risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI & Autonomous Technologies End User Feedback, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Contacts With Groups & Associations
compensating_control_1.description:
Mechanisms exist to establish contact with selected groups and associations within the security, compliance and resilience communities to: 
(1) Facilitate ongoing cybersecurity and data protection education and training for organizational personnel;
(2) Maintain currency with recommended cybersecurity and data protection practices, techniques and technologies; and
(3) Share current cybersecurity and/or data protection-related information including threats, vulnerabilities and incidents.
compensating_control_1.justification: Contacts With Groups & Associations (GOV-07) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies End User Feedback (AAT-11.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_2.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies End User Feedback (AAT-11.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
